creator: deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
text:
I have submitted a modified GNAT port to asami to make it build
under 2.2 and 3.0-current regardless of what patch state the
FreeBSD gcc compiler is in.  The originator of the GNAT port,
Maurice Castro, asked me to handle any problems with the port
because he does not currently have any time.

If there is anything else I can do to help this port into
being committed, please let me know.

Dan Eischen
deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
